icp: Job titles: VP of Demand Generation, VP of Marketing, CMO, Chief Marketing Officer, Director of Demand Generation, Director of Marketing, VP of Growth, Chief Digital Officer, Marketing Operations Manager, Marketing Operations Director, Content Marketing Manager, Content Marketing Director, Digital Marketing Manager, ABM Manager, Growth Marketing Manager. Industries: B2B SaaS, Enterprise Tech, DevOps, Fintech, Financial Services, Healthcare, Life Sciences, eCommerce, Retail. Company size: 500+ employees. Geography: United States. Targeting notes: Senior marketing decision-makers at mid-to-large B2B tech companies. These people own demand gen budgets and care deeply about lead quality, not just volume.
offerDescription:
Verified MQLs for B2B tech companies via content syndication on a pure cost-per-lead model. Clients define their ICP, provide gated content, and OpGen delivers leads who engaged with that content and match parameters exactly.

Unique angle: You only pay for leads you accept. 100% verified MQLs, 500+ publisher network, 500+ intent signals, ABM-capable, ICP assessment upfront before you commit, direct CRM/MAP integrations.

Talking points: The guarantee -- you approve every lead, you don't pay for rejects. ICP precision -- title, company size, intent signals, ABM-capable. Audience size transparency -- we'll tell you the exact universe before you commit. Named logos -- DocuSign, Citrix, Workfront.

Free offer / hook: Free ICP assessment -- send us your ICP and we'll tell you exactly how many people in our network match before you commit.

Primary CTA: Soft ask -- 'Happy to hop on a quick call' or 'Any interest in a test run?'

Booking link: http://calendly.com/msp-one/opgen-intro

Avoid: 'Just checking in', long intros about OpGen before getting to the point, overselling the product upfront, vague subject lines, overpromising on volume.
voiceTone: Direct and conversational, short, confident, human -- not salesy or formal. These prospects live in demand gen. They get pitched constantly. Lead with the guarantee and get out of the way. Short messages win here. Avoid: 'Just checking in', long intros, overselling, vague subject lines. Sound like a sharp demand gen peer talking to another demand gen person -- not a vendor pitching.
followUpGuidance:
Short. Lead with the guarantee. Offer the free ICP assessment as a zero-risk entry point.

What NOT to do: Don't start with 'I wanted to reach out'. Don't list all talking points in the first message. Keep it under 100 words.

Example structure (rewrite every time):
Hey [First Name], good to connect.

Quick context on what we do -- OpGen runs content syndication campaigns for B2B tech companies on a pure CPL model. You define your ICP, we deliver leads who match it and engaged with your content. You approve every lead before you pay.

Happy to do a free ICP assessment -- we'll tell you exactly how many people in our network match your parameters before you commit. Worth a look?

-- Nicole
inMailGuidance:
Subject line: Specific and benefit-oriented. Under 8 words.

Body: Under 120 words. Lead with the guarantee. End with the free ICP offer or soft call ask. Include natural sign-off.

Example subject lines (rewrite, never copy):
- 'Verified MQLs -- you only pay for what you approve'
- 'Free ICP assessment for [Company]'
- 'Pay-per-accepted-lead for B2B demand gen'

connectionRequest.a: Hey [First Name], saw you're running demand gen at [Company] -- wanted to connect. We help B2B tech teams get verified MQLs on a pay-per-accepted-lead model. Happy to share more if relevant.
connectionRequest.b: Hey [First Name], noticed you're in demand gen at [Company]. We run content syndication for B2B tech teams on a pure CPL model -- you only pay for leads you approve. Worth connecting.

Hey [First Name], good to connect.

Quick context on what we do -- OpGen runs content syndication campaigns for B2B tech companies on a pure CPL model. You define your ICP, we deliver leads who match it and engaged with your content. You approve every lead before you pay.

Happy to do a free ICP assessment -- we'll tell you exactly how many people in our network match your parameters before you commit. Worth a look?

-- Nicole
followUp.b:
Hey [First Name], good to connect.

One thing that sets us apart at OpGen -- you don't pay for a single lead you don't approve. Pure CPL, 500+ publisher network, intent signals, ABM-capable.

We do a free ICP assessment upfront so you know exactly what you're getting before committing. Clients include DocuSign, Citrix, Workfront.

Any interest in a quick call?

-- Nicole

inMail.subject: Verified MQLs -- you only pay for what you approve
inMail.body:
Hey [First Name],

Came across your profile -- looks like you're running demand gen at [Company].

We work with B2B tech teams on content syndication. Pure CPL model -- you define your ICP, we deliver leads who match and engaged with your content. You review and approve every lead. You don't pay for rejects.

500+ publisher network, intent signals, ABM-capable, direct CRM/MAP integrations. Clients include DocuSign, Citrix, Workfront.

Happy to do a free ICP assessment -- tell you exactly how many people in our network match before you commit.

Worth 20 minutes?

-- Nicole
